sentiment.reasoning: An 8% increase in customer acquisition suggests positive growth momentum for the company.

sentiment.reasoning: Lowering full-year guidance due to softening demand is a clear negative signal for future financial performance.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co announces $8.4B share buyback program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
